guides.title: Full employee onboarding: add employee with all 4 tabs filled
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → Click **Add Employee**
Fill **Personal Info**: first name, last name, email, phone, nationality, city, state, PIN code
Click **Next** → Fill **Employment Info**: department, position, hire date, employment type
Click **Next** → Fill **Emergency Contact**: contact name and phone number
Click **Next** → Fill **Statutory & Banking**: PAN, Aadhaar, bank name, account and IFSC
Toggle **Enable Login** → set password and confirm password
Click **Submit** → verify the new employee appears in the Employees list
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Create user login for newly onboarded employee
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → search for the target employee by name
Click the employee row to open their profile
Click **Create Login** (or go to **Statutory & Banking** tab → User Account section)
Enter email, set password and confirm → click **Save**
Verify a success message confirms the login account was created
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: New employee logs in and sees employee dashboard
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log out of the admin account
Log back in using the **new employee's credentials** (email + password)
Verify the **Employee Dashboard** loads with a personalised welcome
Confirm the sidebar shows: My Timesheet, My Leave, My Payslips, My Attendance, My Profile
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: HR assigns department and position to new employee
steps: Log in as **HR Manager**
Navigate to **Employees** → locate the new employee in the list
Click **Edit** → switch to the **Employment Info** tab
Select the correct **Department** and **Position** from the dropdowns
Click **Save** → verify the profile now shows the assigned department and position
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full employee CRUD: create with all fields → verify profile → edit name → delete
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → click **Add Employee** → fill all required fields
Click **Submit** → verify the employee appears in the list with correct details
Click **Edit** on the employee → change the first name → click **Save**
Click **Terminate/Delete** → confirm the action → verify the employee is removed or marked Terminated
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Search for employee, filter by Active status, filter by department
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → type an employee name in the **Search** bar
Filter by **Status** (Active, Terminated, On Leave) using the dropdown
Filter by **Department** → verify the table updates to show only matching employees
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin exports employee list and verifies download
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → apply any desired filters (department, status)
Click the **Export** button → verify a CSV or Excel file downloads
Open the downloaded file → verify it contains correct, complete employee data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Submit employee form with invalid email, phone, PAN — all validation errors shown
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → click **Add Employee**
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., missing @) → verify the email validation error
Enter a non-10-digit phone number → verify the phone validation error
Enter an invalid PAN format → verify the PAN validation error
Click **Submit** while errors exist → verify the form does not proceed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: View employee profile and navigate all 4 tabs: personal, employment, emergency, statutory
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → click an employee row to open their full profile
Click the **Personal Info** tab → verify name, contact, and address details
Click the **Employment Info** tab → verify department, position, and hire date
Click the **Emergency Contact** tab → verify emergency contact name and phone
Click the **Statutory & Banking** tab → verify PAN, Aadhaar, and bank account info
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager sees only their team members (fewer than admin)
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Log in as **Manager** → navigate to **Employees** (My Team view)
Verify the list shows **only employees** who report to this manager
Compare with the admin view → confirm the manager sees fewer total employees
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin fills full salary structure (basic + all allowances + deductions) and verifies save
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → open an employee's profile → click the **Salary** tab
Fill in **Basic Salary** → add allowances: HRA, transport, medical
Add deductions: PF, ESI, professional tax
Click **Save** → verify the salary structure is saved and gross/net totals display correctly
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits casual leave request with dates and reason
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → click **New Leave Request**
Select **Leave Type** from the dropdown (Annual, Sick, Casual, etc.)
Pick **Start Date** and **End Date** using the date picker
Enter a **Reason** in the text area → click **Submit**
Verify the request appears in the list with **Pending** status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager approves the pending leave request
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Leave Management** → open the **Pending** tab
Locate the employee's leave request in the table
Click **Approve** → optionally add a review comment
Click **Confirm** → verify the status changes to **Approved**
Confirm the employee's leave balance decreases accordingly
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee verifies leave request shows Approved status
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** (employee view)
Verify the approved request shows status **Approved** with the approver's name
Check the leave balance cards at the top — balance should be reduced by the approved days
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits sick leave, manager rejects with reason
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **Leave Management** → open the **Pending** tab
Click **Reject** on the target request → enter a mandatory rejection reason
Click **Confirm** → verify the status changes to **Rejected**
Verify the employee's leave balance is **fully restored**
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee views leave balance cards after approved leave
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** (employee view)
View the **Leave Balance** cards: Annual, Sick, Casual days available
Submit a leave request → verify the balance decreases immediately
Cancel or reject the request → verify the balance is fully restored
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits leave then cancels it before approval
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → find a leave request with **Pending** status
Click **Cancel** on the request → confirm the cancellation
Verify status changes to **Cancelled**
Verify the leave balance is fully **restored**
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits leave overlapping with already-approved leave — should warn/reject
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → submit a leave request for specific dates
Attempt to submit a second request for overlapping dates
Verify the system shows an **overlap error** and blocks the duplicate submission
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee tries to submit leave when balance is zero — should reject
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → confirm leave balance shows **0 days** remaining
Attempt to submit a new leave request for those leave type days
Verify the system shows an **Insufficient balance** error and prevents submission
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin views leave management, filters by status, searches by employee name
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Leave Management** (admin/HR view)
Use the **search bar** to filter by employee name
Filter by **Status** (Pending, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled)
Filter by **Date Range** to narrow to a specific period
Approve or reject requests in bulk or individually as needed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin adds new leave type, verifies it appears, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Leave Types** tab
Click **Add Leave Type** → enter name, default days, and carry-forward rules
Click **Save** → verify the new leave type appears in the list
Click **Edit** to modify an entry → click **Delete** to remove it
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens leave accrual, previews, and runs accrual process
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Leave Management** → view an employee's leave balance
Verify annual leave is accrued based on the employee's hire date and company policy
Check that any carry-forward balance from the previous year is applied
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits 3-day leave, manager approves, balance deducted by 3
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → submit a leave request for specific dates
Attempt to submit a second request for overlapping dates
Verify the system shows an **overlap error** and blocks the duplicate submission
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee checks in, verifies status, checks out, verifies status
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Attendance** → verify today's record is displayed
Click **Check In** → a timestamp is recorded for the start of the work day
After work, click **Check Out** → the system calculates total hours worked
Verify the daily record shows check-in time, check-out time, and duration
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin marks attendance for an employee via management UI
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Attendance Management** → search for the target employee
Select the date and choose the attendance type (Present, Absent, Half Day, On Leave)
Click **Mark Attendance** → verify the record is saved
Check the employee's attendance calendar reflects the admin-marked entry
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee navigates to previous month and verifies attendance data grid
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Attendance** → the current month is shown by default
Use the **Month** and **Year** dropdowns to navigate to a previous period
Verify historical attendance records load correctly for the selected month
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin filters attendance by date and verifies results
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Attendance Management** → use the search bar to find an employee
Apply a **Department** filter to narrow the employee list
Set a **Date Range** filter → verify the summary updates with filtered data
Review totals: Present days, Absent days, and total hours worked
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee checks in but forgets check-out — verify status shows CHECKED IN
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Employee checks in for the day but does not check out (simulate missed check-out)
Navigate to **Attendance Management** as admin → locate the incomplete record
Click **Edit** → manually set the check-out time
Verify total hours are recalculated and the record is now complete
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee fills full week hours (Mon-Fri 8h each), saves draft
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → verify the current week is displayed
Click **Add Entry** → select a **Project** and **Task** from the dropdowns
Enter hours for each day of the week (Mon–Fri) in the time grid
Click **Save Draft** → verify hours are saved and the weekly total updates
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits saved timesheet for approval
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → review all draft entries for the week
Verify the total hours and project breakdown look correct
Click **Submit for Approval** → confirm the submission
Verify the timesheet status changes to **Submitted** and all fields become read-only
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Submitted timesheet is read-only for employee
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → find a timesheet with **Submitted** status
Attempt to edit any hour entry → verify all fields are **read-only**
Verify the Submit button is replaced by a status badge
Confirm the timesheet can only be modified after a manager rejects it
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager approves submitted timesheet with comments
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Timesheet Approvals** (manager view) → view pending team timesheets
Click on an employee's submitted timesheet to review hours by project and day
Click **Approve** → optionally add a comment
Verify the timesheet status changes to **Approved** in the approvals list
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager rejects submitted timesheet with mandatory comments
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Timesheet Approvals** → find a pending team timesheet
Click **Reject** → enter a mandatory rejection reason in the text field
Click **Confirm** → verify status changes to **Rejected**
Employee can now reopen and resubmit the timesheet with corrections
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee edits rejected timesheet and resubmits
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → find a timesheet with **Rejected** status
Read the rejection comment from the manager
Click **Edit** to reopen the timesheet → correct the hours or project entries
Click **Submit** again → verify status returns to **Submitted** for re-approval
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager selects multiple timesheets and bulk-approves
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Timesheet Approvals** → switch to the list/table view
Select multiple pending timesheets using the row checkboxes
Click **Bulk Approve** at the top of the list → confirm the action
Verify all selected timesheets change to **Approved** status simultaneously
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee exports timesheet history to file
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **Timesheet History** → select a date range for the report
Optionally filter by employee, project, or status
Click **Export** → verify a CSV or Excel file downloads to your device
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee adds 2 task rows with different projects, fills hours for both
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → click **Add Entry** → select **Project A**
Enter hours for Project A for the week → click **Save Draft**
Click **Add Entry** again → select **Project B** → enter additional hours
Verify both project entries appear and the weekly total aggregates all hours
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee enters >24 hours in a day — validation rejects
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → try submitting without entering any hours
Verify the validation error: **No hours entered for this week**
Try entering a negative number in any day field → verify it is rejected
Enter valid hours → verify the submit button becomes active
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Empty timesheet submit is blocked
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → ensure the week has no entries
Click **Submit** on the empty timesheet
Verify the system shows an error: hours are required before submitting
Add at least one hour → verify **Submit** is now allowed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee enters >40 weekly hours — overtime indicator appears
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → enter more than 8 hours for a single day
Verify overtime hours are highlighted or flagged in the grid
Submit the timesheet → verify overtime is visible in the manager approval view
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin navigates payroll management page and verifies all 4 tabs exist
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → verify the page loads with all tabs
Click **Payroll List** tab → view all payroll records for the current period
Click **Generate Payroll** tab → view the generation form
Click **Payslip Templates** tab → view configured salary templates
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin navigates to generate tab, selects employees, clicks validate & generate
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → click the **Generate Payroll** tab
Select **Month** and **Year** from the dropdowns
Click **Validate & Generate** → review the preview: salaries, allowances, deductions
Click **Confirm Generate** → verify payroll records are created with **Draft** status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin bulk-finalizes generated payslips
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → select **Draft** payroll records using checkboxes
Review all employee payroll entries for accuracy
Click **Finalize** → confirm the action in the dialog
Verify status changes from **Draft** to **Finalized** (editing is now locked)
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin marks finalized payslips as paid
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → select **Finalized** payroll records
Click **Mark as Paid** → enter the payment date and payment method
Confirm the action → verify status changes to **Paid**
Employee payslips are now available for download from **My Payslips**
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee views own payslips page, checks summary cards and table
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Payslips** (employee view)
View the payslip summary: gross pay, total deductions, and net pay
Check the payslip history showing previous months with their payment status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee downloads a payslip PDF
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Payslips** → find a payslip with **Paid** status
Click the **Download** button on the payslip row
Verify a PDF payslip opens or downloads to your device
Confirm the PDF contains: employee name, pay period, earnings breakdown, deductions, net pay
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin searches payslips and exports to file
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → use the search bar to filter by employee name
Filter by **Month**, **Year**, or **Status** (Draft, Finalized, Paid)
Click **Export** → verify payroll data downloads as a CSV or Excel file
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin views payroll template configuration page
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Template Configuration** (admin only)
View existing templates or click **Add Template** to create a new one
Configure **Earnings**: basic salary, HRA, transport allowance, medical allowance
Configure **Deductions**: PF, ESI, professional tax → click **Save**
Assign the template to specific departments or individual employees
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: HR accesses payroll management with full read/export permissions
steps: Log in as **HR Manager**
Log in as **HR Manager** → navigate to **Payroll Management**
Verify HR can view all employee payroll records
Verify HR can generate, finalize, and mark payroll as paid
Confirm HR access level is equivalent to admin for payroll operations
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee cannot access payroll management page
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to **Payroll Management**
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Navigate to **My Payslips** → verify the employee can only see their own payslips
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Verify generated payslip amounts match employee salary components (basic + allowances - deductions)
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Generate payroll for an employee with a known salary structure
Verify **Gross Pay** = basic salary + HRA + all configured allowances
Verify **Deductions** = PF + ESI + income tax + any other configured deductions
Verify **Net Pay** = Gross Pay − Total Deductions → cross-check with salary structure
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin re-generates payroll for a month that already has payslips
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → find a **Draft** payroll entry
Update the employee's salary structure (e.g., change basic salary)
Return to payroll → click **Regenerate** on the draft entry
Verify the payroll amounts are recalculated and net pay reflects the changes
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee views my tasks, filters by priority High
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Tasks** → view all tasks assigned to you
Filter by **Priority** (High, Medium, Low) using the dropdown
Filter by **Status** (To Do, In Progress, Done) → verify counts update
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee changes task status from Not Started to In Progress
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Tasks** → find a task assigned to you
Click the **Status** dropdown on the task card or row
Select a new status (e.g., **To Do** → **In Progress**)
Verify the task updates in the list immediately with the new status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates project, verifies it appears in project list
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** → click **Add Project**
Fill in project name, description, start date, and end date
Assign team members to the project → click **Save**
Verify the new project appears in the project list with correct details
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates a task under the project, verifies task tab shows it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** → select an existing project
Click **Add Task** → fill task name, description, priority, assignee, and due date
Click **Save** → verify the task appears under the project with all details correct
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin edits project name, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** → click **Edit** on an existing project
Modify the project name or end date → click **Save** → verify the changes
Select an empty project → click **Delete** → confirm deletion
Verify the deleted project no longer appears in the list
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin assigns task to employee and employee sees it in My Tasks
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** (admin/manager) → select a project
Click **Add Task** → fill task name, description, priority, assignee, and due date
Click **Save** → verify the task appears under the project
The assigned employee navigates to **My Tasks** → confirms the task appears
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee cannot access project config page
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → navigate to **My Tasks** → verify only assigned tasks are shown
Attempt to access **Project Configuration** → verify access is denied
Log in as **Manager** → verify access to manage team projects and tasks
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates a new performance review
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** → click **New Review**
Select the employee, review period, and type (Annual, Mid-Year, Probation)
Enter performance ratings for each competency and add written feedback
Click **Save** → verify the review appears in the list with **Draft** status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits self-assessment on their review
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
log in as **Employee** → navigate to **My Reviews**
Find a review with **Pending Self-Assessment** status → click **Self-Assess**
Fill in ratings and comments for each competency area
Click **Submit** → verify status updates and the manager is notified
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin approves the reviewed performance review
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** (manager view) → find a review awaiting approval
Review the employee's self-assessment ratings alongside your own manager ratings
Click **Approve** → confirm the action in the dialog
Verify review status changes to **Approved** and the employee can view the final outcome
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Search reviews by employee name and filter by status
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** → type an employee name in the search bar
Filter by **Status** (Draft, Pending, Manager Review, Approved)
Filter by **Review Period** → verify results update to match the selected filters
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin edits a review, then deletes another
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** → find a review with **Draft** status
Click **Edit** → modify ratings or written comments → click **Save**
Click **Delete** on a draft review → confirm the deletion → verify it is removed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full cycle: create → self-assess → manager-rate → HR-approve → finalize
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Manager creates review → Employee completes self-assessment
Manager adds final ratings → both versions are visible side by side
Manager approves → both parties can view the final approved review
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates department, edits it, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Departments** tab
Click **Add Department** → enter department name and optional description
Click **Save** → verify the department appears in the department list
Click **Edit** to rename it → click **Delete** → confirm removal
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates position, edits it, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Positions** tab
Click **Add Position** → enter job title, select department, and set job level
Click **Save** → verify the position appears in the positions list
Click **Edit** to update details → click **Delete** → confirm removal
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates holiday, verifies it appears, then deletes
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Holidays** tab
Click **Add Holiday** → enter holiday name, date, and type (National / Regional / Optional)
Click **Save** → verify the holiday appears in the holidays list
Click **Edit** to change the date → click **Delete** → confirm removal
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin searches departments by name
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → **Departments** tab
Type a department name in the **Search** bar
Verify the list filters in real time to show only matching departments
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin tries to add department with empty name — validation blocks
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → **Departments** tab → click **Add Department**
Leave the department name field empty → click **Save**
Verify validation error: **Department name is required**
Fill in the name → verify the error clears and saving succeeds
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee cannot access organization management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to access **Organization** settings
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Log in as **Admin** → verify full CRUD access to Departments, Positions, and Holidays
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin tries to delete department with assigned employees — blocked or warned
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → **Departments** tab
Attempt to delete a department that has active employees assigned
Verify system shows a **warning** or prevents deletion with a clear error message
Reassign employees to another department first → verify deletion now succeeds
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates a new user with all fields (email, name, role, password)
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → click the **Create User** tab
Fill in: **Email**, **First Name**, **Last Name**, **Password**, **Confirm Password**, **Role**
Click **Create User** → verify a success message is displayed
Switch to the **Manage** tab → verify the new user appears with the correct role
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin searches user by name and filters by role
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → click the **Manage** tab
Type a name or email in the **Search** bar → verify real-time filtering
Filter by **Role** (Admin, HR, Manager, Employee)
Filter by **Status** (Active, Inactive) → verify results update correctly
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Submit empty form shows validation; password mismatch caught
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → click **Create User**
Submit the empty form → verify all required field errors appear simultaneously
Enter mismatched passwords → verify **Passwords must match** error
Enter an already-used email → verify **Email already in use** error
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Non-admin users cannot access user management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to **User Management**
Verify redirect to the employee dashboard or **Access Denied** message is shown
Log in as **Admin** → verify full access: create, edit, activate/deactivate users
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin changes user role from employee to manager and verifies access changes
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → **Manage** tab → find the target user
Click **Edit** → change the **Role** dropdown (e.g., Employee → Manager)
Click **Save** → verify the role badge updates in the user list
The user's sidebar menu and access permissions reflect the new role on next login
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin deactivates user account, verifies login is blocked
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → **Manage** tab → find an active user
Toggle the **Active** switch to **Inactive** → confirm the action
Verify the user row shows an **Inactive** badge
Attempt to log in as the deactivated user → verify **Account disabled** error
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to employee management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to payroll management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to leave management (admin)
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to attendance management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager denied access to payroll management
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Log in as **Manager** → attempt to access admin-restricted pages (User Management, Payroll Config)
Verify the page redirects or shows an **Access Denied** response for each restricted page
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager can access timesheets and approve them
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Log in as **Manager** → navigate to each manager-allowed section
Verify access to: Leave Approvals, Timesheet Approvals, Team Members, Projects
Confirm each page loads without errors or permission prompts
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: HR can access employee management and leave management
steps: Log in as **HR Manager**
Log in as **HR Manager** → navigate to HR-specific sections
Verify access to: Payroll Management, Employee Management, Leave Management
Confirm HR has read and write access for employee records and payroll actions
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin can access all modules without restriction
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Log in as **Administrator** → verify full system access
Navigate to all major sections: User Management, Organization, Payroll, Reports, Settings
Verify no **Access Denied** messages and all CRUD operations are available
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Session expiry redirects to login page
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Attempt to access a restricted page as **Employee**
Verify the response matches expected role-based permission (allow or deny)
Confirm API returns **403 Forbidden** for unauthorized role access attempts
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin sidebar shows all navigation items and each navigates correctly
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Log in as **Administrator** → verify all admin sidebar sections are visible
Sections expected: Dashboard, Employees, Leave, Timesheets, Payroll, Organization, User Management, Reports, Settings, Help
Click each top-level menu item → verify the correct page loads without errors
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee sidebar shows limited nav items matching role permissions
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → verify the employee sidebar is shown
Sections expected: Dashboard, My Timesheet, My Leave, My Payslips, My Attendance, My Reviews, My Tasks, My Profile, Help
Click each item → verify correct page loads without Access Denied errors
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Profile menu opens with My Profile and Logout options
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Click the **profile avatar** in the top-right corner of the header
Verify the dropdown shows: **My Profile**, **Change Password**, and **Logout**
Click **My Profile** → verify the profile page loads with correct user details
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Navigating to invalid URL shows 404 or redirect
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to a non-existent URL (e.g., /this-page-does-not-exist)
Verify the **404 — Page Not Found** screen appears with a helpful message
Click **Go to Dashboard** or use the browser back button → verify redirect to the home page
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens reports page and verifies date filter and export button
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Reports** (admin/HR only)
View available report types: Employee Summary, Leave Report, Payroll Summary, Timesheet Report
Select parameters (date range, department) → click **Generate**
Verify the report table loads with correct aggregated data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens settings hub and navigates through email/preferences/advanced tabs
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Settings Hub** (admin only)
View the available settings categories: General, Email, Security, Notifications
Update a setting (e.g., company name or email config) → click **Save**
Verify the change is persisted after a page refresh
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens restore management page and verifies reviews/balances/users tabs
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Restore Management** (admin only)
View the **Backup History** tab → confirm backup records are listed with timestamps
Check the **Data Import** tab → verify the import interface is accessible
Check the **Audit Trail** tab → view recent system changes and restore points
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin exports report data and verifies download triggers
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Reports** → generate any available report
Click **Export** → verify the report downloads in CSV or PDF format
Open the downloaded file → verify it contains correct report data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full hire-to-paycheck: create employee → assign dept → create login → generate payslip
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Configure employee salary structure → ensure timesheets are submitted and approved
Generate payroll for the same period → verify payroll uses approved timesheet hours
Finalize and mark payroll as Paid → employee downloads the payslip
Verify the payslip shows correct regular and overtime pay using the timesheet data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Approved leave day shows as leave in attendance view (not absent)
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Employee submits a leave request for specific dates → manager approves it
Navigate to **Attendance Management** → view the approved leave dates
Verify those dates automatically show **On Leave** status in the attendance record
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Approved timesheet hours reflect in payroll calculation
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Employee submits weekly timesheets → manager approves them
Admin generates payroll for the same period
Verify payroll calculation includes the **approved timesheet hours**
Confirm the payslip shows correct total hours worked and corresponding pay
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Dashboard stat cards reflect actual employee/leave/attendance counts
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Log in as **Administrator** → view the system dashboard with organisation-wide statistics
Verify stats: total employees, pending leave requests, pending timesheets, payroll status
Log in as **Manager** → confirm the dashboard shows team-specific metrics
Log in as **Employee** → confirm personal stats: leave balance, timesheet status, latest payslip
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full employee onboarding: add employee with all 4 tabs filled
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → Click **Add Employee**
Fill **Personal Info**: first name, last name, email, phone, nationality, city, state, PIN code
Click **Next** → Fill **Employment Info**: department, position, hire date, employment type
Click **Next** → Fill **Emergency Contact**: contact name and phone number
Click **Next** → Fill **Statutory & Banking**: PAN, Aadhaar, bank name, account and IFSC
Toggle **Enable Login** → set password and confirm password
Click **Submit** → verify the new employee appears in the Employees list
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Create user login for newly onboarded employee
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → search for the target employee by name
Click the employee row to open their profile
Click **Create Login** (or go to **Statutory & Banking** tab → User Account section)
Enter email, set password and confirm → click **Save**
Verify a success message confirms the login account was created
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: New employee logs in and sees employee dashboard
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log out of the admin account
Log back in using the **new employee's credentials** (email + password)
Verify the **Employee Dashboard** loads with a personalised welcome
Confirm the sidebar shows: My Timesheet, My Leave, My Payslips, My Attendance, My Profile
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: HR assigns department and position to new employee
steps: Log in as **HR Manager**
Navigate to **Employees** → locate the new employee in the list
Click **Edit** → switch to the **Employment Info** tab
Select the correct **Department** and **Position** from the dropdowns
Click **Save** → verify the profile now shows the assigned department and position
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits casual leave request with dates and reason
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → click **New Leave Request**
Select **Leave Type** from the dropdown (Annual, Sick, Casual, etc.)
Pick **Start Date** and **End Date** using the date picker
Enter a **Reason** in the text area → click **Submit**
Verify the request appears in the list with **Pending** status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager approves the pending leave request
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Leave Management** → open the **Pending** tab
Locate the employee's leave request in the table
Click **Approve** → optionally add a review comment
Click **Confirm** → verify the status changes to **Approved**
Confirm the employee's leave balance decreases accordingly
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee verifies leave request shows Approved status
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** (employee view)
Verify the approved request shows status **Approved** with the approver's name
Check the leave balance cards at the top — balance should be reduced by the approved days
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits sick leave, manager rejects with reason
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **Leave Management** → open the **Pending** tab
Click **Reject** on the target request → enter a mandatory rejection reason
Click **Confirm** → verify the status changes to **Rejected**
Verify the employee's leave balance is **fully restored**
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee views leave balance cards after approved leave
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** (employee view)
View the **Leave Balance** cards: Annual, Sick, Casual days available
Submit a leave request → verify the balance decreases immediately
Cancel or reject the request → verify the balance is fully restored
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits leave then cancels it before approval
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → find a leave request with **Pending** status
Click **Cancel** on the request → confirm the cancellation
Verify status changes to **Cancelled**
Verify the leave balance is fully **restored**
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits leave overlapping with already-approved leave — should warn/reject
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → submit a leave request for specific dates
Attempt to submit a second request for overlapping dates
Verify the system shows an **overlap error** and blocks the duplicate submission
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee tries to submit leave when balance is zero — should reject
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → confirm leave balance shows **0 days** remaining
Attempt to submit a new leave request for those leave type days
Verify the system shows an **Insufficient balance** error and prevents submission
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin views leave management, filters by status, searches by employee name
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Leave Management** (admin/HR view)
Use the **search bar** to filter by employee name
Filter by **Status** (Pending, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled)
Filter by **Date Range** to narrow to a specific period
Approve or reject requests in bulk or individually as needed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin adds new leave type, verifies it appears, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Leave Types** tab
Click **Add Leave Type** → enter name, default days, and carry-forward rules
Click **Save** → verify the new leave type appears in the list
Click **Edit** to modify an entry → click **Delete** to remove it
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens leave accrual, previews, and runs accrual process
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Leave Management** → view an employee's leave balance
Verify annual leave is accrued based on the employee's hire date and company policy
Check that any carry-forward balance from the previous year is applied
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits 3-day leave, manager approves, balance deducted by 3
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Leave** → submit a leave request for specific dates
Attempt to submit a second request for overlapping dates
Verify the system shows an **overlap error** and blocks the duplicate submission
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee checks in, verifies status, checks out, verifies status
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Attendance** → verify today's record is displayed
Click **Check In** → a timestamp is recorded for the start of the work day
After work, click **Check Out** → the system calculates total hours worked
Verify the daily record shows check-in time, check-out time, and duration
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin marks attendance for an employee via management UI
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Attendance Management** → search for the target employee
Select the date and choose the attendance type (Present, Absent, Half Day, On Leave)
Click **Mark Attendance** → verify the record is saved
Check the employee's attendance calendar reflects the admin-marked entry
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee navigates to previous month and verifies attendance data grid
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Attendance** → the current month is shown by default
Use the **Month** and **Year** dropdowns to navigate to a previous period
Verify historical attendance records load correctly for the selected month
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin filters attendance by date and verifies results
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Attendance Management** → use the search bar to find an employee
Apply a **Department** filter to narrow the employee list
Set a **Date Range** filter → verify the summary updates with filtered data
Review totals: Present days, Absent days, and total hours worked
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee checks in but forgets check-out — verify status shows CHECKED IN
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Employee checks in for the day but does not check out (simulate missed check-out)
Navigate to **Attendance Management** as admin → locate the incomplete record
Click **Edit** → manually set the check-out time
Verify total hours are recalculated and the record is now complete
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee fills full week hours (Mon-Fri 8h each), saves draft
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → verify the current week is displayed
Click **Add Entry** → select a **Project** and **Task** from the dropdowns
Enter hours for each day of the week (Mon–Fri) in the time grid
Click **Save Draft** → verify hours are saved and the weekly total updates
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits saved timesheet for approval
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → review all draft entries for the week
Verify the total hours and project breakdown look correct
Click **Submit for Approval** → confirm the submission
Verify the timesheet status changes to **Submitted** and all fields become read-only
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Submitted timesheet is read-only for employee
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → find a timesheet with **Submitted** status
Attempt to edit any hour entry → verify all fields are **read-only**
Verify the Submit button is replaced by a status badge
Confirm the timesheet can only be modified after a manager rejects it
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager approves submitted timesheet with comments
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Timesheet Approvals** (manager view) → view pending team timesheets
Click on an employee's submitted timesheet to review hours by project and day
Click **Approve** → optionally add a comment
Verify the timesheet status changes to **Approved** in the approvals list
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager rejects submitted timesheet with mandatory comments
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Timesheet Approvals** → find a pending team timesheet
Click **Reject** → enter a mandatory rejection reason in the text field
Click **Confirm** → verify status changes to **Rejected**
Employee can now reopen and resubmit the timesheet with corrections
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee edits rejected timesheet and resubmits
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → find a timesheet with **Rejected** status
Read the rejection comment from the manager
Click **Edit** to reopen the timesheet → correct the hours or project entries
Click **Submit** again → verify status returns to **Submitted** for re-approval
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager selects multiple timesheets and bulk-approves
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Navigate to **Timesheet Approvals** → switch to the list/table view
Select multiple pending timesheets using the row checkboxes
Click **Bulk Approve** at the top of the list → confirm the action
Verify all selected timesheets change to **Approved** status simultaneously
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee exports timesheet history to file
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **Timesheet History** → select a date range for the report
Optionally filter by employee, project, or status
Click **Export** → verify a CSV or Excel file downloads to your device
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee adds 2 task rows with different projects, fills hours for both
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → click **Add Entry** → select **Project A**
Enter hours for Project A for the week → click **Save Draft**
Click **Add Entry** again → select **Project B** → enter additional hours
Verify both project entries appear and the weekly total aggregates all hours
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee enters >24 hours in a day — validation rejects
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → try submitting without entering any hours
Verify the validation error: **No hours entered for this week**
Try entering a negative number in any day field → verify it is rejected
Enter valid hours → verify the submit button becomes active
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Empty timesheet submit is blocked
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → ensure the week has no entries
Click **Submit** on the empty timesheet
Verify the system shows an error: hours are required before submitting
Add at least one hour → verify **Submit** is now allowed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee enters >40 weekly hours — overtime indicator appears
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Timesheet** → enter more than 8 hours for a single day
Verify overtime hours are highlighted or flagged in the grid
Submit the timesheet → verify overtime is visible in the manager approval view
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin navigates payroll management page and verifies all 4 tabs exist
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → verify the page loads with all tabs
Click **Payroll List** tab → view all payroll records for the current period
Click **Generate Payroll** tab → view the generation form
Click **Payslip Templates** tab → view configured salary templates
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin navigates to generate tab, selects employees, clicks validate & generate
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → click the **Generate Payroll** tab
Select **Month** and **Year** from the dropdowns
Click **Validate & Generate** → review the preview: salaries, allowances, deductions
Click **Confirm Generate** → verify payroll records are created with **Draft** status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin bulk-finalizes generated payslips
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → select **Draft** payroll records using checkboxes
Review all employee payroll entries for accuracy
Click **Finalize** → confirm the action in the dialog
Verify status changes from **Draft** to **Finalized** (editing is now locked)
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin marks finalized payslips as paid
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → select **Finalized** payroll records
Click **Mark as Paid** → enter the payment date and payment method
Confirm the action → verify status changes to **Paid**
Employee payslips are now available for download from **My Payslips**
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee views own payslips page, checks summary cards and table
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Payslips** (employee view)
View the payslip summary: gross pay, total deductions, and net pay
Check the payslip history showing previous months with their payment status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee downloads a payslip PDF
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Payslips** → find a payslip with **Paid** status
Click the **Download** button on the payslip row
Verify a PDF payslip opens or downloads to your device
Confirm the PDF contains: employee name, pay period, earnings breakdown, deductions, net pay
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin searches payslips and exports to file
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → use the search bar to filter by employee name
Filter by **Month**, **Year**, or **Status** (Draft, Finalized, Paid)
Click **Export** → verify payroll data downloads as a CSV or Excel file
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin views payroll template configuration page
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Template Configuration** (admin only)
View existing templates or click **Add Template** to create a new one
Configure **Earnings**: basic salary, HRA, transport allowance, medical allowance
Configure **Deductions**: PF, ESI, professional tax → click **Save**
Assign the template to specific departments or individual employees
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: HR accesses payroll management with full read/export permissions
steps: Log in as **HR Manager**
Log in as **HR Manager** → navigate to **Payroll Management**
Verify HR can view all employee payroll records
Verify HR can generate, finalize, and mark payroll as paid
Confirm HR access level is equivalent to admin for payroll operations
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee cannot access payroll management page
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to **Payroll Management**
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Navigate to **My Payslips** → verify the employee can only see their own payslips
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Verify generated payslip amounts match employee salary components (basic + allowances - deductions)
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Generate payroll for an employee with a known salary structure
Verify **Gross Pay** = basic salary + HRA + all configured allowances
Verify **Deductions** = PF + ESI + income tax + any other configured deductions
Verify **Net Pay** = Gross Pay − Total Deductions → cross-check with salary structure
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin re-generates payroll for a month that already has payslips
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Payroll Management** → find a **Draft** payroll entry
Update the employee's salary structure (e.g., change basic salary)
Return to payroll → click **Regenerate** on the draft entry
Verify the payroll amounts are recalculated and net pay reflects the changes
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee views my tasks, filters by priority High
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Tasks** → view all tasks assigned to you
Filter by **Priority** (High, Medium, Low) using the dropdown
Filter by **Status** (To Do, In Progress, Done) → verify counts update
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee changes task status from Not Started to In Progress
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Navigate to **My Tasks** → find a task assigned to you
Click the **Status** dropdown on the task card or row
Select a new status (e.g., **To Do** → **In Progress**)
Verify the task updates in the list immediately with the new status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates project, verifies it appears in project list
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** → click **Add Project**
Fill in project name, description, start date, and end date
Assign team members to the project → click **Save**
Verify the new project appears in the project list with correct details
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates a task under the project, verifies task tab shows it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** → select an existing project
Click **Add Task** → fill task name, description, priority, assignee, and due date
Click **Save** → verify the task appears under the project with all details correct
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin edits project name, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** → click **Edit** on an existing project
Modify the project name or end date → click **Save** → verify the changes
Select an empty project → click **Delete** → confirm deletion
Verify the deleted project no longer appears in the list
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin assigns task to employee and employee sees it in My Tasks
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Project Configuration** (admin/manager) → select a project
Click **Add Task** → fill task name, description, priority, assignee, and due date
Click **Save** → verify the task appears under the project
The assigned employee navigates to **My Tasks** → confirms the task appears
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee cannot access project config page
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → navigate to **My Tasks** → verify only assigned tasks are shown
Attempt to access **Project Configuration** → verify access is denied
Log in as **Manager** → verify access to manage team projects and tasks
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates a new performance review
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** → click **New Review**
Select the employee, review period, and type (Annual, Mid-Year, Probation)
Enter performance ratings for each competency and add written feedback
Click **Save** → verify the review appears in the list with **Draft** status
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee submits self-assessment on their review
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
log in as **Employee** → navigate to **My Reviews**
Find a review with **Pending Self-Assessment** status → click **Self-Assess**
Fill in ratings and comments for each competency area
Click **Submit** → verify status updates and the manager is notified
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin approves the reviewed performance review
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** (manager view) → find a review awaiting approval
Review the employee's self-assessment ratings alongside your own manager ratings
Click **Approve** → confirm the action in the dialog
Verify review status changes to **Approved** and the employee can view the final outcome
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Search reviews by employee name and filter by status
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** → type an employee name in the search bar
Filter by **Status** (Draft, Pending, Manager Review, Approved)
Filter by **Review Period** → verify results update to match the selected filters
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin edits a review, then deletes another
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employee Reviews** → find a review with **Draft** status
Click **Edit** → modify ratings or written comments → click **Save**
Click **Delete** on a draft review → confirm the deletion → verify it is removed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full cycle: create → self-assess → manager-rate → HR-approve → finalize
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Manager creates review → Employee completes self-assessment
Manager adds final ratings → both versions are visible side by side
Manager approves → both parties can view the final approved review
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates department, edits it, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Departments** tab
Click **Add Department** → enter department name and optional description
Click **Save** → verify the department appears in the department list
Click **Edit** to rename it → click **Delete** → confirm removal
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates position, edits it, then deletes it
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Positions** tab
Click **Add Position** → enter job title, select department, and set job level
Click **Save** → verify the position appears in the positions list
Click **Edit** to update details → click **Delete** → confirm removal
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates holiday, verifies it appears, then deletes
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → click the **Holidays** tab
Click **Add Holiday** → enter holiday name, date, and type (National / Regional / Optional)
Click **Save** → verify the holiday appears in the holidays list
Click **Edit** to change the date → click **Delete** → confirm removal
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin searches departments by name
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → **Departments** tab
Type a department name in the **Search** bar
Verify the list filters in real time to show only matching departments
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin tries to add department with empty name — validation blocks
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → **Departments** tab → click **Add Department**
Leave the department name field empty → click **Save**
Verify validation error: **Department name is required**
Fill in the name → verify the error clears and saving succeeds
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee cannot access organization management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to access **Organization** settings
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Log in as **Admin** → verify full CRUD access to Departments, Positions, and Holidays
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin tries to delete department with assigned employees — blocked or warned
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Organization** → **Departments** tab
Attempt to delete a department that has active employees assigned
Verify system shows a **warning** or prevents deletion with a clear error message
Reassign employees to another department first → verify deletion now succeeds
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin creates a new user with all fields (email, name, role, password)
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → click the **Create User** tab
Fill in: **Email**, **First Name**, **Last Name**, **Password**, **Confirm Password**, **Role**
Click **Create User** → verify a success message is displayed
Switch to the **Manage** tab → verify the new user appears with the correct role
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin searches user by name and filters by role
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → click the **Manage** tab
Type a name or email in the **Search** bar → verify real-time filtering
Filter by **Role** (Admin, HR, Manager, Employee)
Filter by **Status** (Active, Inactive) → verify results update correctly
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Submit empty form shows validation; password mismatch caught
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → click **Create User**
Submit the empty form → verify all required field errors appear simultaneously
Enter mismatched passwords → verify **Passwords must match** error
Enter an already-used email → verify **Email already in use** error
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Non-admin users cannot access user management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to **User Management**
Verify redirect to the employee dashboard or **Access Denied** message is shown
Log in as **Admin** → verify full access: create, edit, activate/deactivate users
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin changes user role from employee to manager and verifies access changes
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → **Manage** tab → find the target user
Click **Edit** → change the **Role** dropdown (e.g., Employee → Manager)
Click **Save** → verify the role badge updates in the user list
The user's sidebar menu and access permissions reflect the new role on next login
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin deactivates user account, verifies login is blocked
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **User Management** → **Manage** tab → find an active user
Toggle the **Active** switch to **Inactive** → confirm the action
Verify the user row shows an **Inactive** badge
Attempt to log in as the deactivated user → verify **Account disabled** error
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full hire-to-paycheck: create employee → assign dept → create login → generate payslip
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Configure employee salary structure → ensure timesheets are submitted and approved
Generate payroll for the same period → verify payroll uses approved timesheet hours
Finalize and mark payroll as Paid → employee downloads the payslip
Verify the payslip shows correct regular and overtime pay using the timesheet data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Approved leave day shows as leave in attendance view (not absent)
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Employee submits a leave request for specific dates → manager approves it
Navigate to **Attendance Management** → view the approved leave dates
Verify those dates automatically show **On Leave** status in the attendance record
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Approved timesheet hours reflect in payroll calculation
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Employee submits weekly timesheets → manager approves them
Admin generates payroll for the same period
Verify payroll calculation includes the **approved timesheet hours**
Confirm the payslip shows correct total hours worked and corresponding pay
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Dashboard stat cards reflect actual employee/leave/attendance counts
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Log in as **Administrator** → view the system dashboard with organisation-wide statistics
Verify stats: total employees, pending leave requests, pending timesheets, payroll status
Log in as **Manager** → confirm the dashboard shows team-specific metrics
Log in as **Employee** → confirm personal stats: leave balance, timesheet status, latest payslip
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to employee management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to payroll management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to leave management (admin)
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee denied access to attendance management
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → attempt to navigate to an admin-only page (e.g., User Management)
Verify the page redirects to the employee dashboard or shows **Access Denied**
Confirm the employee sidebar does not show any admin-only menu items
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager denied access to payroll management
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Log in as **Manager** → attempt to access admin-restricted pages (User Management, Payroll Config)
Verify the page redirects or shows an **Access Denied** response for each restricted page
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager can access timesheets and approve them
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Log in as **Manager** → navigate to each manager-allowed section
Verify access to: Leave Approvals, Timesheet Approvals, Team Members, Projects
Confirm each page loads without errors or permission prompts
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: HR can access employee management and leave management
steps: Log in as **HR Manager**
Log in as **HR Manager** → navigate to HR-specific sections
Verify access to: Payroll Management, Employee Management, Leave Management
Confirm HR has read and write access for employee records and payroll actions
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin can access all modules without restriction
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Log in as **Administrator** → verify full system access
Navigate to all major sections: User Management, Organization, Payroll, Reports, Settings
Verify no **Access Denied** messages and all CRUD operations are available
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Session expiry redirects to login page
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Attempt to access a restricted page as **Employee**
Verify the response matches expected role-based permission (allow or deny)
Confirm API returns **403 Forbidden** for unauthorized role access attempts
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin sidebar shows all navigation items and each navigates correctly
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Log in as **Administrator** → verify all admin sidebar sections are visible
Sections expected: Dashboard, Employees, Leave, Timesheets, Payroll, Organization, User Management, Reports, Settings, Help
Click each top-level menu item → verify the correct page loads without errors
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Employee sidebar shows limited nav items matching role permissions
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Log in as **Employee** → verify the employee sidebar is shown
Sections expected: Dashboard, My Timesheet, My Leave, My Payslips, My Attendance, My Reviews, My Tasks, My Profile, Help
Click each item → verify correct page loads without Access Denied errors
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Profile menu opens with My Profile and Logout options
steps: Log in as **Employee**
Click the **profile avatar** in the top-right corner of the header
Verify the dropdown shows: **My Profile**, **Change Password**, and **Logout**
Click **My Profile** → verify the profile page loads with correct user details
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Navigating to invalid URL shows 404 or redirect
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to a non-existent URL (e.g., /this-page-does-not-exist)
Verify the **404 — Page Not Found** screen appears with a helpful message
Click **Go to Dashboard** or use the browser back button → verify redirect to the home page
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens reports page and verifies date filter and export button
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Reports** (admin/HR only)
View available report types: Employee Summary, Leave Report, Payroll Summary, Timesheet Report
Select parameters (date range, department) → click **Generate**
Verify the report table loads with correct aggregated data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens settings hub and navigates through email/preferences/advanced tabs
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Settings Hub** (admin only)
View the available settings categories: General, Email, Security, Notifications
Update a setting (e.g., company name or email config) → click **Save**
Verify the change is persisted after a page refresh
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin opens restore management page and verifies reviews/balances/users tabs
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Restore Management** (admin only)
View the **Backup History** tab → confirm backup records are listed with timestamps
Check the **Data Import** tab → verify the import interface is accessible
Check the **Audit Trail** tab → view recent system changes and restore points
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin exports report data and verifies download triggers
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Reports** → generate any available report
Click **Export** → verify the report downloads in CSV or PDF format
Open the downloaded file → verify it contains correct report data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Full employee CRUD: create with all fields → verify profile → edit name → delete
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → click **Add Employee** → fill all required fields
Click **Submit** → verify the employee appears in the list with correct details
Click **Edit** on the employee → change the first name → click **Save**
Click **Terminate/Delete** → confirm the action → verify the employee is removed or marked Terminated
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Search for employee, filter by Active status, filter by department
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → type an employee name in the **Search** bar
Filter by **Status** (Active, Terminated, On Leave) using the dropdown
Filter by **Department** → verify the table updates to show only matching employees
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin exports employee list and verifies download
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → apply any desired filters (department, status)
Click the **Export** button → verify a CSV or Excel file downloads
Open the downloaded file → verify it contains correct, complete employee data
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Submit employee form with invalid email, phone, PAN — all validation errors shown
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → click **Add Employee**
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., missing @) → verify the email validation error
Enter a non-10-digit phone number → verify the phone validation error
Enter an invalid PAN format → verify the PAN validation error
Click **Submit** while errors exist → verify the form does not proceed
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: View employee profile and navigate all 4 tabs: personal, employment, emergency, statutory
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → click an employee row to open their full profile
Click the **Personal Info** tab → verify name, contact, and address details
Click the **Employment Info** tab → verify department, position, and hire date
Click the **Emergency Contact** tab → verify emergency contact name and phone
Click the **Statutory & Banking** tab → verify PAN, Aadhaar, and bank account info
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Manager sees only their team members (fewer than admin)
steps: Log in as **Team Lead / Manager**
Log in as **Manager** → navigate to **Employees** (My Team view)
Verify the list shows **only employees** who report to this manager
Compare with the admin view → confirm the manager sees fewer total employees
Verify the expected outcome is achieved

guides.title: Admin fills full salary structure (basic + all allowances + deductions) and verifies save
steps: Log in as **Administrator**
Navigate to **Employees** → open an employee's profile → click the **Salary** tab
Fill in **Basic Salary** → add allowances: HRA, transport, medical
Add deductions: PF, ESI, professional tax
Click **Save** → verify the salary structure is saved and gross/net totals display correctly
Verify the expected outcome is achieved
